name: Pickling Spice with Chilies (English)
recipeInstructions:
An English mixture of whole spices, used for chutneys, pickled fruits and vegetables, and to spice vinegar. The spices can either be tied in a small muslin bag and removed after pickling, or added straight to the vinegar, depending on the type of pickle.
Spice merchants have their own versions; here are two given in Law's Grocer's Manual (1950 edition). To make manageable domestic amounts, substitute 25 grams (1 ounce) or even 15 grams (1/2 ounce) for each pound.
